## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss pricing and features for seoClarity's platform for growthx.ai's agency needs.](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dave needs to reduce the initial quote of $107k/year to \~$60k/year](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [growthx.ai requires flexibility for rapid client growth (30+ domains, expanding soon)](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Core needs: rankings, reporting, market research, API integration; less emphasis on crawling](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Decision timeline: Dave can sign as early as Monday if price point is met](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

## Topics

### Pricing Negotiation

  - [Initial quote of $107k/year too high for growthx.ai's budget](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Dave's target: \~$60k/year](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Strategies to reduce cost:](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Cut keyword count (e.g., 500 instead of 1000 per partner)](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Delay AI tracking features](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Focus on core platform features initially](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Client Growth and Scalability

  - [Current clients: \~30 domains](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Rapid growth expected: 5 new clients closing this week, more in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Need flexibility to add domains at same per-domain cost](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Most clients are startups with smaller sites (e.g., 1000 pages), but expected to grow](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### Feature Priorities

  - [Essential: Rankings, reporting, search insights, market research](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [API integration crucial (no internal data center)](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Crawling: Low priority, quarterly audits sufficient](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Content capabilities less important (have existing solution)](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Using Scrunch for AI-related features ($300/month, 350 custom prompts)](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [seoClarity considering including RKI despite competition](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Implementation Timeline

  - [Dave ready to sign as early as Monday if price point is met](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [seoClarity team to work on revised proposal immediately](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

## Next Steps

  - [seoClarity team (Terry/Mitul) to create revised proposal targeting $60k/year](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Send proposal to Dave via email by end of day or Monday](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [If agreeable, Dave to sign contract early next week](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Begin onboarding and API integration process post-signing](https://fathom.video/share/wHbyrkK9v-6FZy9RaShK-gxWL1qrqAuu?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
